title: lindernia pulchella
intro: Lindernia pulchella, also known as the pretty blue or blue buttons, is a small, delicate flowering plant that belongs to the Linderniaceae family. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are attributed to the presence of certain alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Lindernia pulchella include its potential to aid in reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting the immune system. Lindernia pulchella is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used as a topical application to soothe skin irritations and wounds.
